verses.text: Stand fast in the Lord; help the women that laboured with me in the gospel. Steadfast and helping. He urges firmness and care for fellow-workers.
Stand fast in the Lord; help the women that laboured with me in the gospel. Steadfast and helping. He urges firmness and care for fellow-workers.
Stand fast in the Lord; help the women that laboured with me in the gospel. Steadfast and helping. He urges firmness and care for fellow-workers.
'Rejoice in the Lord alway: and again I say, Rejoice'; let your moderation be known. Constant joy. Gladness in the Lord befits the believer always.
'Rejoice in the Lord alway: and again I say, Rejoice'; let your moderation be known. Constant joy. Gladness in the Lord befits the believer always.
'Be careful for nothing; but... let your requests be made known unto God'; the peace of God shall keep you. Anxiety to prayer. Prayer brings a peace beyond understanding.
'Be careful for nothing; but... let your requests be made known unto God'; the peace of God shall keep you. Anxiety to prayer. Prayer brings a peace beyond understanding.
Whatsoever is true, honest, just, pure, lovely, 'think on these things.' Pure thoughts. The mind is to dwell on what is good.
Whatsoever is true, honest, just, pure, lovely, 'think on these things.' Pure thoughts. The mind is to dwell on what is good.
I have learned 'in whatsoever state I am, therewith to be content.' Contentment. He has learned to rest in God in any lot.
I have learned 'in whatsoever state I am, therewith to be content.' Contentment. He has learned to rest in God in any lot.
I have learned 'in whatsoever state I am, therewith to be content.' Contentment. He has learned to rest in God in any lot.
'I can do all things through Christ which strengtheneth me.' Strength in Christ. His sufficiency is in the Lord, not himself.
Ye did well to share my affliction; ye sent again and again to my need. Faithful givers. Their kindness is gratefully owned.
Ye did well to share my affliction; ye sent again and again to my need. Faithful givers. Their kindness is gratefully owned.
Ye did well to share my affliction; ye sent again and again to my need. Faithful givers. Their kindness is gratefully owned.
'My God shall supply all your need according to his riches in glory by Christ Jesus.' Rich supply. God repays the generous out of His fulness.
'My God shall supply all your need according to his riches in glory by Christ Jesus.' Rich supply. God repays the generous out of His fulness.
'My God shall supply all your need according to his riches in glory by Christ Jesus.' Rich supply. God repays the generous out of His fulness.
Glory be to God; all the saints salute you; the grace of Christ be with you. Closing praise. He ends in doxology and blessing.
Glory be to God; all the saints salute you; the grace of Christ be with you. Closing praise. He ends in doxology and blessing.
